requirement_topic.zh: 智能充电通信协议（ISO 15118 / OCPP）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能充電通訊協議（ISO 15118 / OCPP）

summary.en: EU Regulation 2023/1804 (AFIR) requires publicly accessible recharging points to be digitally connected and capable of smart recharging where technically feasible. OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) is not mandated by EU law as a CE essential requirement but is widely required by network operators for back-office communication. EN 50549-1/-2 applies to generating units, including V2G-capable chargers that can export to the grid, for connection conditions. Communication technical specifications are reserved under AFIR Annex II and subject to later official delegated acts.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规2023/1804（AFIR）要求公众可访问充电点实现数字连接，并在技术可行时具备智能充电能力。OCPP（开放充电点协议）并非欧盟法律规定的CE基本要求，但广泛被充电网络运营商要求用于后台通信。EN 50549-1/-2适用于可向电网输出电力的发电单元（包括具备V2G功能的充电桩）的并网条件。通信技术规范在AFIR附件II下保留，并取决于后续正式授权法案。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規2023/1804（AFIR）要求公眾可訪問充電點實現數碼連接，並在技術可行時具備智能充電能力。OCPP（開放充電點協議）並非歐盟法律規定的CE基本要求，但廣泛被充電網絡運營商要求用於後台通訊。EN 50549-1/-2適用於可向電網輸出電力的發電單元（包括具備V2G功能的充電樁）的併網條件。通訊技術規範在AFIR附件II下保留，並取決於後續正式授權法案。

standards_or_laws: EU Regulation 2023/1804 (AFIR) — Alternative Fuels Infrastructure Regulation
ISO 15118-1:2019, ISO 15118-2:2022, ISO 15118-20:2022 — Vehicle to Grid Communication Interface
OCPP 1.6 / OCPP 2.0.1 — Open Charge Point Protocol (Open Charge Alliance)
EN 50549-1:2019, EN 50549-2:2019 — Requirements for generating plants connected to distribution networks (relevant for V2G export)

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers commonly use GB/T 27930 for DC charger-to-BMS communication (conduction charging communication protocol) and GB/T 34658 for interoperability. These are technically incompatible with ISO 15118 in protocol stack, data model, and physical-layer assumptions. China does not currently require or commonly implement ISO 15118 or OCPP in its domestic charger ecosystem. GB/T 27930-2023 (effective 1 April 2024) supersedes GB/T 27930-2015. The 2023 edition supports Category A (standard CAN-based) and Category B (high-power up to 1.2 MW) charging and discharging systems. GB/T 27930.2-2024 covers communication protocols for the GB/T 20234.3 coupler.
summary.zh: 国内电动汽车充电桩普遍采用GB/T 27930（直流充电桩与电动汽车BMS通信协议）及GB/T 34658（互操作性）。上述标准在协议栈、数据模型及物理层假设上均与ISO 15118不兼容。中国目前不要求也不普遍实施ISO 15118或OCPP。GB/T 27930-2023（2024年4月1日起实施）已取代GB/T 27930-2015。2023版支持A类（标准CAN通信）和B类（大功率，最高1.2MW）充放电系统。GB/T 27930.2-2024涵盖GB/T 20234.3接口的通信协议。
summary.zht: 國內電動汽車充電樁普遍採用GB/T 27930（直流充電樁與電動汽車BMS通訊協議）及GB/T 34658（互操作性）。上述標準在協議棧、數據模型及物理層假設上均與ISO 15118不相容。中國目前不要求也不普遍實施ISO 15118或OCPP。GB/T 27930-2023（2024年4月1日起實施）已取代GB/T 27930-2015。2023版支持A類（標準CAN通訊）和B類（大功率，最高1.2MW）充放電系統。GB/T 27930.2-2024涵蓋GB/T 20234.3接口的通訊協定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Digital communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and electric vehicle (supersedes 2015 edition; effective 1 April 2024)
GB/T 27930.2-2024 — Communication protocols for GB/T 20234.3 coupler
GB/T 34658-2017 — Interoperability Test Specification for EV Conductive Charging System

gap.en: Fundamental protocol incompatibility: GB/T 27930 (Chinese DC charger-BMS comms) is not recognised or used in the EU. EU public charging networks and operators may require ISO 15118 for Plug & Charge and smart/bidirectional charging, and OCPP for back-office interoperability, through procurement or operator contracts. AFIR Annex II reserves communication technical specifications for later official delegated acts. A CN-market charger designed only for GB/T 27930 may need a communication stack redesign to meet EU operator requirements and future official specifications. V2G export additionally triggers EN 50549 grid-connection conditions.
gap.zh: 存在根本性协议不兼容：GB/T 27930（中国直流充电桩-BMS通信）在欧盟不被认可或使用。欧盟公共充电网络及运营商可通过采购或运营商合同要求ISO 15118用于即插即充及智能/双向充电，并要求OCPP用于后台互操作。AFIR附件II保留通信技术规范，待后续官方授权法案规定。仅适配GB/T 27930的国产充电桩可能需要重新设计通信协议栈，以满足欧盟运营商要求及未来官方规范。若支持V2G输出，还须符合EN 50549电网接入条件。
gap.zht: 存在根本性協議不相容：GB/T 27930（中國直流充電樁-BMS通訊）在歐盟不被認可或使用。歐盟公共充電網絡及運營商可透過採購或運營商合約要求ISO 15118用於即插即充及智能/雙向充電，並要求OCPP用於後台互操作。AFIR附件II保留通訊技術規範，待後續官方授權法案規定。僅適配GB/T 27930的國產充電樁可能需要重新設計通訊協議棧，以滿足歐盟運營商要求及未來官方規範。若支援V2G輸出，還須符合EN 50549電網接入條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible recharging points where applicable, including digital connectivity and smart-recharging capability where technically feasible. OCPP and ISO 15118 are not CE mandates by themselves; they may be required by operator contracts, procurement specifications or later AFIR delegated/implementing acts. EN 50549 applies through grid-connection rules only where V2G export/generating-unit operation is present.
mandatory_status.cn: not required — GB/T 27930 is the domestic standard; ISO 15118 and OCPP are not mandated in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: High gap. A charger built for the Chinese GB/T 27930 ecosystem is not compatible with common EU smart-charging expectations. Communication technical specifications are reserved under AFIR Annex II and subject to later official delegated acts, while ISO 15118 and OCPP may be required by operators or future official specifications. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 差距显著。面向中国GB/T 27930生态的充电桩与欧盟常见智能充电预期不兼容。通信技术规范已在AFIR附件II中保留，待后续官方授权法案规定；ISO 15118和OCPP可能由运营商或未来官方规范要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 差距顯著。面向中國GB/T 27930生態的充電樁與歐盟常見智能充電預期不相容。通訊技術規範已在AFIR附件II中保留，待後續官方授權法案規定；ISO 15118和OCPP可能由運營商或未來官方規範要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。

requirement_topic.zh: 电网互动 / V2G输出要求（EN 50549）
requirement_topic.zht: 電網互動 / V2G輸出要求（EN 50549）

summary.en: For EV chargers capable of bidirectional power flow (V2G / Vehicle-to-Grid), the charger acts as a generating unit when exporting power. Mandatory grid-connection obligations arise from EU network code rules, national grid codes and local DSO approval. EN 50549-1:2019/A1:2023 and EN 50549-2:2019/A1:2023 are CENELEC technical standards commonly used to demonstrate connection conditions such as voltage/frequency ride-through, anti-islanding protection, and reactive power control; they are not the legal obligation by themselves.
summary.zh: 对于具备双向功率流能力（V2G/车辆到电网）的充电桩，在输出电力时其作为发电单元运行。强制性并网义务来自欧盟网络规范、各国电网规程及当地配电系统运营商批准。EN 50549-1:2019/A1:2023及EN 50549-2:2019/A1:2023是CENELEC技术标准，通常用于证明电压/频率穿越、防孤岛保护及无功功率控制等并网条件；其本身并非法律义务。
summary.zht: 對於具備雙向功率流能力（V2G/車輛到電網）的充電樁，在輸出電力時其作為發電單元運行。強制性併網義務來自歐盟網絡規範、各國電網規程及當地配電系統運營商批准。EN 50549-1:2019/A1:2023及EN 50549-2:2019/A1:2023是CENELEC技術標準，通常用於證明電壓/頻率穿越、防孤島保護及無功功率控制等併網條件；其本身並非法律義務。

standards_or_laws: EN 50549-1:2019/A1:2023 — Requirements for generating plants connected to LV distribution networks (≤110 kW; current edition, CENELEC approved 21 Sep 2023)
EN 50549-2:2019/A1:2023 — Requirements for generating plants connected to MV distribution networks (current edition)
EU Commission Regulation 2016/631 (NC RfG) — Network Code on Requirements for Grid Connection of Generators
ISO 15118-20:2022 — V2G communication interface (bidirectional power transfer)

summary.en: China's V2G standards are nascent. GB/T 40429-2021 covers EV charging system technical requirements (AC), and GB/T 34657 covers interoperability, but a comprehensive V2G bidirectional grid-export standard equivalent to EN 50549 does not yet exist as a widely enforced domestic requirement. National standards for V2G grid connection are under development by SAC/TC114. As of June 2026, a comprehensive mandatory V2G grid-export standard equivalent to EN 50549 has not been confirmed as widely enforced domestically. SAC/TC114 V2G grid-connection work is ongoing; confirm latest status with SAC.
summary.zh: 中国V2G标准尚处起步阶段。GB/T 40429-2021涵盖电动汽车充电系统技术要求（交流），GB/T 34657涵盖互操作性，但与EN 50549相当的综合性V2G双向并网标准尚未作为国内普遍强制要求存在。SAC/TC114正在制定V2G并网国家标准。截至2026年6月，与EN 50549等效的综合性强制V2G并网标准尚未确认在国内广泛执行。SAC/TC114 V2G并网标准制定工作仍在推进中，请向SAC确认最新状态。
summary.zht: 中國V2G標準尚處起步階段。GB/T 40429-2021涵蓋電動汽車充電系統技術要求（交流），GB/T 34657涵蓋互操作性，但與EN 50549相當的綜合性V2G雙向並網標準尚未作為國內普遍強制要求存在。SAC/TC114正在制定V2G並網國家標準。截至2026年6月，與EN 50549等效的綜合性強制V2G並網標準尚未確認在國內廣泛執行。SAC/TC114 V2G並網標準制定工作仍在推進中，請向SAC確認最新狀態。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 40429-2021 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements

GB/T 34657-2017 — Interoperability test specification for EV conductive charging system (covers interoperability testing for AC conductive charging; V2G bidirectional export scope is limited in this standard — comprehensive V2G grid-export standard equivalent to EN 50549 not yet confirmed in CN domestic requirements)

gap.en: CN chargers designed without V2G export capability have no direct EN 50549 issue. Any CN charger adding V2G/bidirectional export for EU markets must satisfy the applicable EU network code, national grid-code and DSO requirements. EN 50549 can be used as the technical route for anti-islanding, ride-through and reactive power evidence, while ISO 15118-20 may be needed for bidirectional communication. This represents a significant hardware and firmware development gap.
gap.zh: 未具备V2G输出功能的国产充电桩不存在直接EN 50549问题。任何为欧盟市场新增V2G/双向输出功能的国产充电桩，须满足适用的欧盟网络规范、各国电网规程及配电系统运营商要求。EN 50549可作为防孤岛、穿越能力和无功功率证据的技术路径，ISO 15118-20可能用于双向通信。这代表着显著的硬件及固件开发差距。
gap.zht: 未具備V2G輸出功能的國產充電樁不存在直接EN 50549問題。任何為歐盟市場新增V2G/雙向輸出功能的國產充電樁，須滿足適用的歐盟網絡規範、各國電網規程及配電系統運營商要求。EN 50549可作為防孤島、穿越能力和無功功率證據的技術路徑，ISO 15118-20可能用於雙向通訊。這代表著顯著的硬件及固件開發差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where V2G/bidirectional export applies: EU network code, national grid-code and DSO connection approval requirements. EN 50549-1:2019/A1:2023 and EN 50549-2:2019/A1:2023 are voluntary/nationally used technical standards for demonstrating those requirements, not standalone EU legal obligations.
mandatory_status.cn: Not yet enforced — V2G grid-export standards under development by SAC/TC114; no equivalent mandatory domestic requirement confirmed as of June 2026

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Commission — Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (NC RfG), which mandates the technical requirements implemented by EN 50549

compliance_verdict.en: High gap for V2G-capable products. No Chinese domestic equivalent to the EU grid-connection framework is confirmed; new compliance work is required for EU grid-export operation. EN 50549 is a technical route used for connection evidence, while the mandatory obligations come from EU network code rules, national grid codes and DSO approval. Non-V2G chargers are not affected. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or certification advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 对具备V2G功能的产品而言差距显著。尚未确认国内存在与欧盟并网框架等效的要求；在欧盟实现电网输出运行须开展新的合规工作。EN 50549是用于并网证据的技术路径，强制性义务来自欧盟网络规范、各国电网规程及DSO批准。不具备V2G功能的充电桩不受影响。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或认证建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 對具備V2G功能的產品而言差距顯著。尚未確認國內存在與歐盟併網框架等效的要求；在歐盟實現電網輸出運行須開展新的合規工作。EN 50549是用於併網證據的技術路徑，強制性義務來自歐盟網絡規範、各國電網規程及DSO批准。不具備V2G功能的充電樁不受影響。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或認證建議。
